data.title: FatPipe Stock Rips 126% On Nasdaq Debut Before Paring Some Gains After-Hours
data.description: FatPipe shares skyrocketed 126.08% to $13.00 from their initial public offering price of $5.75 per share during their Nasdaq debut, before sliding 20.77% to $10.30 in after-hours trading.

data.title: Peabody Energy, Core Natural Spike In Rally Stoked By Trump's Executive Order Ending 'War On Beautiful, Clean Coal'
data.description: Leading coal stocks rallied on Tuesday amidst a broader market decline after U.S. President Donald Trump signed an executive order aimed at "reinvigorating America's beautiful clean coal industry" according to a White House fact sheet on the matter.

data.title: Bitcoin 11% Away From Falling Below Strategy's Average Buying Price, But Michael Saylor's Confidence In Apex Crypto Remains Intact
data.description: Strategy Inc. (NASDAQ:MSTR) risked incurring unrealized losses on its Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) purchases, yet co-founder Michael Saylor remains bullish on the apex cryptocurrency.

data.title: Alibaba Stock Plunges 32% Since March Peak As US-China Trade Tensions Escalate Amid Trump Tariff Moves, Chair Joe Tsai Says 'Everybody Is Concerned'
data.description: Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. shares have plummeted 32.50% since mid-March as escalating trade tensions between the U.S. and China threaten to derail the e-commerce giant's international business model.

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Dogecoin Plunge Deeper Amid US-China Trade War 2.0: Analyst Foresees 'Rapid' Crypto Recovery Whenever Tariff Solution Reached
data.description: Leading cryptocurrencies dived further on Tuesday as U.S.-China trade war fears fueled downside volatility.
